issue.title: [server] Fix H2 Flyway migration compatibility in tests
issue.goal: Resolve Flyway migration syntax errors under the local H2 in-memory test database, allowing repository unit tests to load the application context and pass successfully.
acceptanceCriteria: Flyway migrations pass successfully when launching tests on the H2 database.
Repository tests load the Spring context without syntax or bean creation errors.
Verification output shows database tests pass successfully.
evidenceRequired: Successful test output showing pass status.
Verification log showing H2 compatibility settings or DDL adjustment evidence.

description: Flyway runs MySQL DDL statements on H2 during tests, raising syntax errors and context load failures.
